hero.p: Hi, I'm Krish. I build intuitive, high-performance software for Windows and Android. Let's make something amazing together.

about.p1: I am an independent software developer passionate about building high-quality, user-respecting digital products. I believe that software should be beautiful, fast, and accessible everywhere.
about.p2: Whether it's native Windows applications that feel right at home on Windows, or cross-platform utilities that bridge the gap between devices, I focus on delivering seamless experiences with clean code and modern architecture.

product.name: Arion
product.description: A flagship application showcasing the best of native performance and cross-platform design. Built to be intuitive, fast, and secure.

features.title: Lightning Fast
features.description: Optimized for modern architectures and processors, ensuring your tasks complete in milliseconds, not seconds.

features.title: Responsive UI
features.description: A fluid interface that adapts to your screen size and workflow seamlessly, built with modern web and native components.

features.title: Cloud Sync
features.description: Your data synchronizes automatically across all your devices in real-time, keeping you productive everywhere.

features.title: Secure by Design
features.description: Your data is encrypted locally before touching any server. We prioritize your privacy above all else.

features.title: Dark Mode
features.description: A beautifully crafted dark mode that is easy on the eyes and integrates perfectly with system preferences.

features.title: Shortcuts
features.description: Navigate the entire application without taking your hands off the keyboard, thanks to comprehensive shortcut support.

footer.description: Kzova Labs is an independent software development studio building high-quality Windows and cross-platform applications.

legal.privacy_content:
1. Introduction

Welcome to Arion VPN. We respect your privacy and are committed to protecting it. This Privacy Policy explains our practices regarding the collection, use, and disclosure of information when you use our mobile application (the "App").

2. No Logs Policy

Arion VPN operates under a strict No-Logs Policy. We do not collect, store, or share any of the following data:

  • IP Addresses (Local or VPN-assigned)
  • Browsing History
  • Traffic Destination or Metadata
  • DNS Queries
  • Connection Timestamps or Session Durations

3. Data We Do Not Collect

We do not require you to create an account, provide an email address, or provide any personal identification to use the core features of the App.

4. Third-Party Services

The App utilizes the public SoftEther and VPNGate volunteer network. While we do not log your data, volunteer servers are operated by third parties. By using the App, you acknowledge that you are routing your traffic through public infrastructure.

We use Google AdMob to provide advertisements that keep the App free. AdMob may collect certain device information (such as Advertising IDs) to serve personalized ads. You can opt out of personalized ads through your device settings.

  • Google Privacy Policy: https://policies.google.com/privacy

5. Changes to This Privacy Policy

We may update our Privacy Policy from time to time. We will notify you of any changes by posting the new Privacy Policy on this page.

6. Contact Us

If you have any questions or suggestions about our Privacy Policy, do not hesitate to contact us.
legal.terms_content:
1. Acceptance of Terms

By downloading, installing, or using Arion VPN, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions. If you do not agree to these terms, do not use the application.

2. Acceptable Use

You agree to use Arion VPN for lawful purposes only. You must not use our service to transmit illegal material, engage in fraudulent activities, or intentionally bypass or harm our network infrastructure.

3. Account Security

You are responsible for maintaining the confidentiality of your account credentials. Arion VPN is not liable for any unauthorized access that occurs due to your failure to secure your account.

4. Limitation of Liability

Arion VPN is provided "as is" without warranties of any kind. We do not guarantee uninterrupted service and are not liable for any data loss, financial loss, or damages resulting from your use of the service.

5. Termination

We reserve the right to suspend or terminate your access to Arion VPN at our sole discretion if we believe you have violated these Terms and Conditions.
